description: Example: claim denied because the candidate source is raw model output (invariant violation). Raw model output is never admitted truth.

policyDecision.reason: Claim 'claim-deny-001' sourced from 'model_output' is not admissible. Raw model output is not admitted truth.
policyDecision.remediation: Provide a verified citation, human-authored anchor, or an explanation-traced derivation before submitting this claim.

invariants_enforced: Raw model output is not admitted truth.
Raw graph candidate is not admitted truth.
Raw vector candidate is never admitted truth; VectorCandidate.status must remain candidate_only.
